storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH004_SC004

## Production Intent
Move the narrative from high-stakes public spectacle into a controlled, private setting. Establish the caretaking relationship between sola and the Narrator under the direction of tars_tarkas, shifting tone from performance to physical recovery.

## Required Cast
- The Narrator
- tars_tarkas
- sola

## Required Environments
- Audience Chamber (Large marble/gold architecture)
- Corridors
- Private quarters

## Continuity Constraints
- Physical state of the Narrator (hunger and fatigue must be visually consistent)
- Height relationship between sola and the Narrator

## Beat List
- BT001: The Narrator refuses to perform due to hunger.
- BT002: Tars Tarkas assigns Sola to look after the Narrator.
- BT003: Sola begins providing sustenance in private quarters.
